title: DarkZoom
description: A simple and basic zoom mod. Works server-side too.
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkZoom


Activate zoom mode and zoom in on the area you are viewing | View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)
 

This simple and basic mod allows you to zoom in on an area using a command. This works server-side as well so you don't need this installed on the client. Simply use the trigger command /trigger darkzoom and you will enter a zoomed mode which will show you a zoomed view of what you are seeing. This effect lasts for 2 seconds and can be reactivated again.

Note: This makes use of the in-game FOV function. Make sure your FOV slider is at 100% for this to work correctly.


 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpack.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
